item.title: Cloud Images in EVE-NG
item.author: Adam Smith
item.description: EVE-NG has documentation on how set up Linux nodes, but provides prepared images. This is helpful, but the latest Ubuntu image is 20.04.2 and we don’t know the origins of these images. Fortunately, it’s easy to get Ubuntu and Debian cloud images working in EVE-NG Create Custom Template We will need to create a custom template as we will want some options that aren’t specified in the Linux one # linux-cloud.
